name: Double Chocolate Bread Pudding
recipeIngredient: 1 cup BAKER'S Semi-Sweet Real Chocolate Chips
1 pkg. (8-serving JELL-O Chocolate Cook & Serve Pudding
recipeInstructions:
No Experience Required
Ready In: 55 minutes.
HEAT oven to 350°F.
STIR pudding mix into milk with wire whisk in large bowl for 1 minute or until well blended. Stir in bread. Pour pudding mixture into 13x9-inch baking dish. Sprinkle evenly with chocolate chips. BAKE for 45 minutes or until pudding just comes to boil in center. Remove from oven. Let stand for 10 minutes. Serve warm. Store leftover pudding in refrigerator. Makes 12 servings.
